title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sports Authority India Capital India! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sports Authority India Capital India:
Sports Authority India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India Capital India!
